name: Notion
description: Search pages, create docs, update databases
longDescription: Connect your Notion workspace so the AI can search across pages, draft new documents, append to existing ones, and read or update database rows—turning research on any page into a saved note instantly.
author: BrowseCortex

apiKeyConfig.label: Notion Internal Integration Token
apiKeyConfig.helperText: Create an internal integration and share the pages you want to access

examplePrompts: Save a summary of this article to my Reading database
Find my notes about the Q3 roadmap
Create a meeting-notes page for today
Add this task to my project tracker
What's on my Notion to-do list?
